---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report a bug in Capsule to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug, triage
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Component

Which component is affected?

- [ ] Backend (API Server)
- [ ] Frontend (Web Dashboard)
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Infrastructure / Deployment
- [ ] Documentation

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output.

<details>
<summary>Log output</summary>

```
Paste logs here
```

</details>

## Environment

- **Capsule Version:** [e.g., v0.4.0]
- **OS:** [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11]
- **Go Version:** [e.g., 1.22.3] (if backend/CLI issue)
- **Node Version:** [e.g., 20.11.0] (if frontend issue)
- **Browser:** [e.g., Chrome 125, Firefox 126] (if frontend issue)
- **Docker Version:** [e.g., 24.0.7] (if deployment issue)

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here. Include links to related issues if applicable.
